finder.title: Deck Finder
finder.emptyList: No decks match. Loosen a filter.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this deck?
deleteConfirm.description: This will remove the deck and all its version history.

validity.legendaryOverLimit: {cardId}: legendary may have at most 1 copy.
validity.offClassCard: {cardId} is a {cardClass} card; deck class is {deckClass}.
validity.heroInMainDeck: {cardId}: hero cards are not allowed in the main deck.

import.title: Import Deck
import.deckstringLabel: Paste a deckstring or load from clipboard

error.unknownCard: This deck references a card not in your card database (cardId: {cardId}). The deckstring may be from a future patch.

export.title: Export Deck
export.illegalDeck: Cannot export an illegal deck. Add the missing cards first.

error.nonCollectible: This deck contains cards that cannot be saved (generated tokens, cosmetic copies, etc.).

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your experience and tracker behavior.

overlayPanel.enableDescription: Display the deck tracker as a transparent always-on-top window during a Hearthstone match.
overlayPanel.enableOpponentDescription: Display the opponent's revealed cards as a separate transparent always-on-top window during a Hearthstone match.
overlayPanel.runningHint: Active only while Hearthstone is running

settings.appBehaviorDescription: Manage how the application launches and runs.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the app.
settings.autoStartDescription: Launch the app when your computer starts
settings.minimizeToTrayDescription: Keep running in background when closed
settings.hardwareAccelerationDescription: Use GPU to render UI. Disable if you experience stuttering.
settings.deckTrackerDescription: Configure what information is shown during matches.
settings.showPlayerTrackerDescription: Display remaining cards in your deck
settings.showOpponentTrackerDescription: Track cards played by your opponent
settings.secretsHelperDescription: Display possible secrets when opponent plays one
settings.underConstructionDescription: These settings will be available in the next update. Please check back later.

density.title: Density
density.description: Control the compactness of the UI.

accent.title: Accent
accent.description: Choose the accent color for highlights.

about.title: About OpenDeckTracker
about.updateAvailable: Update available: {version} (downloading in background, will install on quit).
about.updateUnsupported: Auto-update is only available in packaged builds.
about.openFailed: Failed to open the file. It may be missing or inaccessible.
about.disclaimer: OpenDeckTracker is an independent third-party tool. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Blizzard Entertainment, Inc. Hearthstone is a trademark of Blizzard Entertainment, Inc. Use of this software in conjunction with Hearthstone may be subject to Blizzard's terms of service; the user assumes all associated risks.

deckTracker.deckNotDetected: Current deck not detected. Select it in the dialog.
deckTracker.hearthstoneNotRunningHint: Start the game to begin live deck tracking.

onboarding.bannerHsNotRunningBody: Live deck tracking and overlays activate automatically once the game is open. Decks, statistics, and the popular-deck library remain available offline.
onboarding.bannerWaitingBody: Hearthstone is connected. Your deck and opponent panels will populate when a match begins.
onboarding.bannerInMatchBody: Tracking active. Drag the in-game overlays to reposition them; they remember their last placement.

globalEffects.emptyBody: Match-wide modifiers triggered by either player will appear here.

artanis.title: Artanis
artanis.body: The caster's Protoss minions cost (2) less for the rest of the match. Stacks with Photon Cannon and Sentry.

brash-battlemaster.title: Brash Battlemaster
brash-battlemaster.body: After this minion dies, the caster's Silver Hand Recruits gain +1 Attack for the rest of the match.

cleansing-cleric.title: Cleansing Cleric
cleansing-cleric.body: Healing dealt by the caster's side restores 2 more Health for the rest of the match.

emboldening-blade.title: Emboldening Blade
emboldening-blade.body: The caster's Silver Hand Recruits gain +1/+1 for the rest of the match. Stacks with other Recruit buffs.

foreboding-flame.title: Foreboding Flame
foreboding-flame.body: Demons that didn't start in the caster's deck cost (1) less for the rest of the match.

interstellar-starslicer.title: Interstellar Starslicer
interstellar-starslicer.body: Each battlecry and deathrattle reduces the cost of the caster's Librams by (1). Stacks with Interstellar Wayfarer.

interstellar-wayfarer.title: Interstellar Wayfarer
interstellar-wayfarer.body: Each battlecry and deathrattle reduces the cost of the caster's Librams by (1). Stacks per copy played.

inzah.title: Inzah
inzah.body: The caster's Overload cards cost (1) less for the rest of the match.

photon-cannon.title: Photon Cannon
photon-cannon.body: If Photon Cannon's damage killed a minion, the caster's Protoss minions cost (1) less for the rest of the match.

pursuit-of-justice.title: Pursuit of Justice
pursuit-of-justice.body: Silver Hand Recruits the caster summons gain +1 Attack for the rest of the match.

resilient-savior.title: Resilient Savior
resilient-savior.body: Once this minion loses Divine Shield, the caster's Silver Hand Recruits gain +1 Health for the rest of the match.

roam-free.title: Roam Free
roam-free.body: The caster's future Animal Companions are summoned from 3 random Beasts that cost (2) more, locked in when Roam Free was played.

sentry.title: Sentry
sentry.body: After Sentry dies, the caster's Protoss minions cost (1) less for the rest of the match.

talya-earthstrider.title: Talya Earthstrider
talya-earthstrider.body: The caster's cards that summon Animal Companions summon 1 additional Companion for the rest of the match.

tame-pet.title: Tame Pet
tame-pet.body: The caster's future Animal Companions are summoned from 3 random Beasts that cost (1) more, locked in when Tame Pet was played.

deckSelect.title: Select the deck for this match
deckSelect.description: Automatic detection failed. Choose the deck you are currently using.
deckSelect.empty: No saved decks. Create a deck in Hearthstone first.

collection.title: My Collection
collection.subtitle: Track your progress and missing cards.

massDisenchant.title: Mass Disenchant Available
massDisenchant.body: You have {count} duplicate cards that can be safely disenchanted.

stats.title: Constructed Stats
stats.subtitle: Detailed breakdown of your ranked performance.

kpi.bestDeckPlaceholder: Stats will appear after tracked games
